name: Reasonable Adjustments : A VR experience based on dyslexia

reviews.review_description:
This experience does a good job of putting you in the shoes of someone with dyslexia and helps you understand their perspective on the world. I feel it could be useful in school and would cut down on bullying and help kids with dyslexia too. 

The voice acting is good and very clear.

Feedback: maybe have the entire thing subtitled like in the first part. This would help scenes that are static

developer_response.body:
Hi RaelXRWorkout, 

Thank you for taking the time to experience and review the experience.

reviews.review_description:
Well made experience.

Only thing I'd want adding is that the hands animate grabwise
